IRS990.ActivityOrMissionDesc: TO ENHANCE AND PROTECT THE DESIRABILITY AND ATTRACTIVENESS OF THE LAND LOCATED IN THE TOWN OF PRINCEVILLE ISLAND OF KAUAI, STATE OF HAWAII, FOR THE MUTUAL BENEFIT AND PROTECTION OF THE COMMUNITY
IRS990.MissionDesc: TO ENHANCE AND PROTECT THE DESIRABILITY AND ATTRACTIVENESS OF THE LAND LOCATED IN THE TOWN OF PRINCEVILLE ISLAND OF KAUAI, STATE OF HAWAII, FOR THE MUTUAL BENEFIT AND PROTECTION OF THE COMMUNITY
IRS990.Desc: Maintenance of the common areas - The Association is responsible for the maintenance of the roadways, road signs and street lights, parks, roadside easements, and cul-de-sac plantings.

ProgSrvcAccomActy2Grp.Desc: Enforcement and protection - The Association patrols the community to ensure rules compliance with the protective covenants. In addition, the Association performs a design review of all construction projects to ensure compliance with the rules.

OtherLiabilitiesOrgGrp.Desc: Current Portion of Finance Lease Liabilities

SupplementalInformationDetail.ExplanationTxt: AS AMENDED Class of Members of Stockholders,Owners of property in the community make up the members of the Association.
AS AMENDED Election of Members and Their Rights: At the annual meeting of the Association, members vote on the Associations governing Board of Directors, as the term of directors expire or terminate
AS AMENDED Organizations Process to Review 990: A copy of the Form 990 is distributed to board members. Discussion and approval is obtained at a board meeting prior to filing the form.
ENFORCEMENT OF CONFLICTS POLICY. THE GENERAL MANAGER AND BOARD OF DIRECTORS MONITOR ON AN ONGOING BASIS.
COMPENSATION PROCESS FOR TOP OFFICIAL.THE GENERAL MANAGERS COMPENSATION IS REVIEWED BY THE BOARD OF DIRECTORS ON AN ANNUAL BASIS DURING THE BUDGET PROCESS.
GOVERNING DOCUMENTS DISCLOSURE EXPLANATIN GOVERNING DOCUMENTS, CONFLICT OF INTEREST POLICY AND FINANCIAL STATEMENTS ARE AVAILABLE TO ASSOCIATION MEMBERS ON THE ASSOCIATION WEBSITE.
AMEND Part I line 3 & 4, Part VI line 1a&1b AMENDED 5, ORIGINAL 4
AMEND Part I line 6 Number of volunteers is AMENDED 40, ORIGINAL 0
AMEND Part III line 4a Expenses AMENDED 1,121,641 ORIGINAL 914,471
AMEND Part III Line 4b Expenses AMENDED 335,637 ORIGINAL 525,810
AMEND Part VI Line 11a Original 990 was not provided to the board prior to filing. Amended 990 was provided to the board prior to filing.
AMEND Part VI Line 17 AMENDED [BLANK] ORIGINAL HI, The association is not requred to file a copy of Form 990 with any state.
